testcase.name: test_payroll_preview_includes_leave_entitlements
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration26_features.py:265: in test_payroll_preview_includes_leave_entitlements assert preview_response.status_code == 200, f"Failed to generate preview: {preview_response.text}" E AssertionError: Failed to generate preview: {"detail":"Not Found"} E assert 404 == 200 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code
